## Meeting Purpose

[Hiring manager interview with Victor Alagbe for Technical Managing Editor role at GrowthX](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=332.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [Victor has 12+ years of content marketing experience, including leadership roles at Risk Labs, Cryptonary, and Animals](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=512.0)
  - [Strong background in implementing content workflows, AI tools, and brand consistency measures](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=701.0)
  - [GrowthX operates a services model generating blog content for clients, with potential to surface their Atlas AI product in the future](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=1673.0)
  - [Role involves managing 3-5 clients, overseeing content quality, and improving AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)

## Topics

### Role Overview

  - [Head of customer operations leads delivery organization](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=354.0)
  - [Pod structure: director (long-term strategy), managing editor (day-to-day management), account strategist (client-facing, SEO)](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=377.0)
  - [Focus on content quality and technical aspects of AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=438.0)
  - [Publish \~5 articles/week per client using custom AI workflows](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=385.0)
  - [Emphasis on improving prompts, processes, and meeting contractual obligations](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=473.0)

### Victor's Background

      - [Head of Editorial/Content at Cryptonary: Transformed team into disciplined editorial machine](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=567.0)
      - [Content Strategist at Animals: Developed fundamentals of scaling content across multiple clients](https://fathom.video/share/L3ox5vSd_segfGzQsd8MFoE9XkVyoAiG?tab=summary&timestamp=660.0)
